title: MythicRewards
description: MythicMobs Support - Top damage rewards - 6+ reward type built-in - Create your own reward rule
body:
[![Discord Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eafa1c5372be5754e21863677d9ea231741e86f.png)](https://discord.gg/RZajEybhBw) [![Plugin Documents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa1bc331fb205621a4ba02bec752fb4718cd951d.png)](https://mythicchanger.superiormc.cn/) ![mythicrewards-logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81869d919aac233b5992c41c5af37a4d7685078f.png)
# **MythicRewards** *Dynamic damage-based reward distribution for Minecraft servers.* MythicRewards is a highly configurable plugin that tracks entity damage and intelligently distributes **rewards** when entities are killed. Built with flexibility in mind, it allows server owners to fully control how rewards are handled through a powerful **rule-based system**. Instead of fixed reward logic, MythicRewards gives you complete freedom — you can use built-in rules or create your own custom distribution logic from scratch.
![Preview 1](https://manyou.gitbook.io/mythicrewards/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F345242565-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FGLJvOhiHQzlgC14HofB4%252Fuploads%252FVqIA0qFfQzwrDfMrjoT7%252F1f64a3f87fcd85c84f238405fea31170.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D54cb70b3-822f-4b09-adb4-9bdd6e648f9d&width=400&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4a548734&sv=2) ![Preview 2](https://manyou.gitbook.io/mythicrewards/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F345242565-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FGLJvOhiHQzlgC14HofB4%252Fuploads%252FUO5xx1K1vJ8kOTXqFEyg%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D5f286b49-d1bb-4efe-b2c4-ffccf8c9ef89&width=400&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7741d18a&sv=2)
## **Features** ### **Flexible Reward Rules System** - 6 built-in reward rules covering common scenarios - Fully customizable rule system — create your own logic - Supports damage-based weighting and probability - Entity matching system allows rewards to apply only to specific mobs, such as bosses ### **Built-in Reward Distribution Modes** - **ALL**: All participants receive the same reward - **PACK**: One player is randomly selected, with higher damage giving a higher chance - **MULTI_PACK**: Multiple players are randomly selected - **RANK**: Top damage dealers receive ranked rewards - **SEPARATE**: Each player has an independent chance to receive rewards - **SEPARATE_PACK**: Rewards are grouped and distributed randomly per group ### **Advanced Damage Tracking & Placeholders** - Accurately records player damage contribution - Built-in placeholders for rankings and statistics - Display top damage dealers and individual performance ### **Multiple Reward Types** - **Action-based**: Execute commands or custom actions - **give_item**: Directly give items to players, automatically dropping them if the inventory is full - **drop_item**: Drop items visible only to the player, supported on Paper 1.19.4+ ### **Powerful Action & Condition System** - Supports complex logic beyond simple commands and permissions - Chance-based execution and conditional checks - Flexible enough to build advanced reward workflows ### **Custom Item Support** - Built-in **ItemFormat** system for creating custom items - Supports custom food, tools, attributes, armor, and more - Compatible with most popular custom item plugins!
